tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_amino_acid module

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_amino_acid.test_essential_amino_acid_addition() → None

Tests the addition of two EssentialAminoAcidRequirements instances.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_amino_acid.test_essential_amino_acid_truediv() → None

Tests the division of an EssentialAminoAcidRequirements instance by a scalar.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_amino_acid.test_essential_amino_acid_truediv_zero() → None

Tests that division by zero raises a ZeroDivisionError.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_amino_acid.test_calculate_scurf(amino_acid: str, NPscurf: float, expected: float) → None

Unit test for AminoAcidCalculator._calculate_scurf()

Unit test for AminoAcidCalculator._calculate_endogenous_urinary_excretion()

Unit test for AminoAcidCalculator._calculate_growth()

Unit test for AminoAcidCalculator._calculate_pregnancy()

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_amino_acid.test_calculate_lactation(amino_acid: str, NPMilk: float, expected: float) → None

Unit test for AminoAcidCalculator._calculate_lactation()

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_amino_acid.test_calculate_lactation_integration(animal_type: AnimalType, lactating: bool, body_weight: float, frame_weight_gain: float, gravid_uterine_weight_gain: float, dry_matter_intake_estimate: float, milk_true_protein: float, milk_production: float, NDF_conc: float, expected: EssentialAminoAcidRequirements) → None

Unit test for AminoAcidCalculator.calculate_essential_amino_acid_requirements()
